description: Known emit gaps: cases intentionally EXCLUDED from the smoke regression accepted-baseline set because TSTS does not yet produce correct output for them. The smoke set (testdata/tests/cases + testdata/baselines/reference) means 'known correct accepted behavior' ONLY; known-broken output is tracked here instead. Each gap remains covered by the external TS-Go conformance corpus, so removing it from the smoke set does not make coverage disappear.

gaps.reason: TSTS emits a malformed `const ;` statement and hoists the const enum as a runtime IIFE for this error-recovery case. TS-Go erases the const enum, replaces the embedded declaration with an empty statement, and emits a `"use strict";` prologue (`if (x) /* before E */ ; /* after E */`). Matching that requires const-enum erasure, use-strict prologue emission, and error-recovery handling that are not a bounded emit-js printer fix.
gaps.status: known emit gap, not accepted baseline
